title: Human approval request (Chapter 9.5)
description: What a human reviewer sees before a workflow run is allowed to proceed: the proposed output itself, the uncertainties research left open, and independent reviewer findings — never a bare confirmation button with no content behind it.

proposed_output.description: The (possibly partial) Account Brief awaiting a decision.

uncertainties.description: Every unresolved_questions entry collected from subagent handoffs (Ch. 8.5), plus anything workflow_state.collect_errors() reports — never silently dropped before reaching the human.
